name: Call Lightning
description: A storm cloud appears at a point within range that you can see above yourself. It takes the shape of a Cylinder that is 10 feet tall with a 60-foot radius. When you cast the spell, choose a point you can see under the cloud. A bolt of lightning flashes down from the cloud to that point. Each creature within 5 feet of that point makes a Dexterity saving throw, taking 3d10 Lightning damage on a failed save or half as much on a successful one. Until the spell ends, you can take a Magic action to call down lightning in this way again, targeting the same point or a different one. Using a Higher-Level Spell Slot. The damage increases by 1d10 for each spell slot level above 3.
